---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# ForestLayers

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

Automatic Stratification of Forest Vertical Layers

## Installation

You can install the development version of ForestLayers like so:

``` r
devtools::install_github("amelie-juckler/ForestLayers")
```

## Utilisation

``` r
library(ForestLayers)

?VerticalLayers_from_1Dprofile
?VerticalLayers_from_3Dgrid
?export_DVV
```
